query:
back to bugfix 473... Sec Review findings: Finding 1 (low, non-blocking): ADR-002 crt-037 not formally superseded

Unimatrix entry #3955 (ADR-002 crt-037: Combined Cap with Informs Second-Priority Ordering) still describes the removed combined-cap design as the current approach. The fix-agent noted it is superseded but did not deprecate or correct the entry. Future agents receiving a briefing may act on stale design intent.

Recommendation: deprecate or correct entry #3955 to reference the new independent-cap design. The pattern anti-pattern entry #3969 captures the fix lesson, but the original ADR-002 needs to be retired.

Finding 2 (low, non-blocking): Combined tick throughput ceiling is now higher

Under the old design, total edges per tick was bounded by max_graph_inference_per_tick. Under the new design it is bounded by max_graph_inference_per_tick + 25. This is intentional, safe (both bounds are compile-time or config constants with no external influence), and detectable via existing log fields. No DoS risk. Worth noting for capacity planning.\
Fix Summary: Fix summary:                                                             
  - Root cause: Phase 5 used remaining_capacity =       
  max_graph_inference_per_tick - supports.len() as Informs' budget — always
   0 when Supports was healthy, permanently starving 278 valid candidates  
  - Files changed:                                                         
  crates/unimatrix-server/src/services/nli_detection_tick.rs
  - New tests: 5 (assert dedicated-budget invariant; replace 6 broken      
  shared-cap tests)                                                  
  - All tests passing: 4261 unit + 22/22 smoke + 13/13 contradiction +     
  41/41 lifecycle                                                     
                                                                           
  Gate: Bug Fix Validation — PASS (11/11)               
  Security Review: LOW risk — no blocking findings      \
thoughts?

entries.title: ADR crt-037 (replacement): Independent per-type budgets in nli_detection_tick Phase 5
ADR-004 crt-034: max_co_access_promotion_per_tick Added to InferenceConfig
